framework.name: AP2 three-mandate architecture
framework.description: AP2 uses three verifiable credential types: Cart Mandates (human-present checkout), Intent Mandates (human-not-present, bounded agent authority), and Payment Mandates (risk signals to issuers/networks). This is the actual technical mechanism for agent authorization — cryptographic proof of user intent, not just API keys.
framework.raw_quote: AP2 defines three primary mandates: Cart Mandate, User-Signed Intent Mandate, Payment Mandate
